items.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
items.summary: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

items.title: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
items.summary: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

items.title: US launches strikes on Iran after second shipping attack
items.summary: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 鬆口氣！美紐澤西州3名青少年失蹤 皆已尋獲無大礙
items.summary: 美國3名未成年男孩25日在紐澤西州蒙特維爾（Montville）失蹤，警方27日於康乃狄克州史丹佛尋獲平安無事的3人，並了解到他們是結伴離家出走，但原因尚不清楚。  據《福斯...…

items.title: 美肯塔基州暴雨洪災釀4死 州長宣布緊急狀態
items.summary: 美國肯塔基州持續降下暴雨引發洪災，部分地區累積降雨量超過6英吋（約152毫米），並且造成4人死亡，州長畢什爾（Andy Beshear）27日宣布進入緊急狀態。  據《ABC...…

items.title: 美麻州世足賽後驚傳槍響 至少4人中彈送醫
